scripts.name: damdanial
scripts.code:
; Paste any AutoHotkey v1 script here exactly as you tested it.
; It runs as its own standalone program on the client - no changes needed.
;
; Example:
!p::
    MsgBox, fucker
    return

scripts.name: ^!k:: message box
scripts.code:
Menu, MyMenu, Add, Open Chrome, Open
Menu, MyMenu, Add, Open Notepad, OpenNotepad
Menu, MyMenu, Add, Open Calculator, OpenCalc

^RButton::
Menu, MyMenu, Show
return

Open:
Run, chrome.exe
return

OpenNotepad:
Run, notepad.exe
return

OpenCalc:
Run, calc.exe
return
